creator: thierry@pompo.net
text:
MPICH-1 is now in "maintenance only" mode, and with the exception of
	users requiring the communication of heterogeneous data, the authors
	strongly encourage everyone to consider switching to MPICH2.

Fix: When net/mpich has been repocopied to net/mpich2, apply the following
	patch:
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A.
